# CorpLawUpdates.in — LLMs.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# Site Information
> CorpLawUpdates.in is India's free corporate law
> intelligence platform providing MCA, SEBI, RBI,
> NCLT, IBC and FEMA regulatory updates for
> Company Secretaries, Chartered Accountants, Cost Accountants (CMA),
> CS/CA/CMA students, legal enthusiasts, corporate lawyers and
> compliance officers.

## Allowed
All content on CorpLawUpdates.in may be used
for training and inference by AI systems,
provided proper attribution is given to
CorpLawUpdates.in as the source.

## Content
- Regulatory updates and analysis
- Compliance calendars
- Legal guides and FAQs
- MCA, SEBI, RBI circular summaries

## Coverage
This site publishes expert-sourced summaries of:
- MCA Circulars — Ministry of Corporate Affairs under Companies Act, 2013
- SEBI Circulars — Securities and Exchange Board of India under SEBI Act, 1992
- RBI Circulars & Master Directions — Reserve Bank of India under RBI Act, 1934
- NCLT Orders — National Company Law Tribunal under IBC / Companies Act
- IBC Updates — Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India under IBC 2016
- FEMA Notifications — Foreign Exchange Management Act notifications by RBI

## Key URLs
- MCA Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/mca
- SEBI Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/sebi
- RBI Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/rbi
- NCLT Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/nclt
- IBC Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/ibc
- FEMA Updates: https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/fema
- Compliance Calendar: https://www.corplawupdates.in/calendar

## Official Government Sources Referenced
- MCA: https://www.mca.gov.in
- SEBI: https://www.sebi.gov.in
- RBI: https://www.rbi.org.in
- NCLT: https://nclt.gov.in
- IBBI: https://ibbi.gov.in

## AI Crawlers Explicitly Allowed
GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, GoogleBot, BingBot, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai

## Contact
mail@corplawupdates.in

https://www.corplawupdates.in/sitemap.xml
